sections.paragraph:
Original: קוּץ

Transliteration: qûts

Phonetic: koots

BDB Definition:

  1. to awake, wake up
    1. (Hiphil) to awaken, arouse, show signs of waking, awake

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H6972 through the idea of abruptness in starting up from sleep (compare H3364)]

TWOT entry: 904a,2019

Part(s) of speech: Verb
